title: Resistance fighter Marc Bloch inducted into Panthéon in moving moment of republican solidarity

title: Ten years after Brexit, the City of London financial district is stronger than ever
subhed: When the UK left the EU following the referendum on June 23, 2016, the City of London financial district had to relinquish some of its activities that were focused on the European market. But it has since bounced back, recording strong growth in insurance and fintech.

title: France faces unprecedented heatwave: 'We are about to experience four of the hottest days ever recorded in the country'
subhed: A prolonged heatwave, rather than a brief spike, has arrived. Unusually high temperatures are set to persist across the country until at least the end of this week, exposing more than 90% of the French population to extreme and rare heat.
